<a id="class-pinjoint2d"></a>

# PinJoint2D

**Inherits:** [Joint2D](class_joint2d.md#class-joint2d) **<** [Node2D](class_node2d.md#class-node2d) **<** [CanvasItem](class_canvasitem.md#class-canvasitem) **<** [Node](class_node.md#class-node) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A physics joint that attaches two 2D physics bodies at a single point, allowing them to freely rotate.

## Description

A physics joint that attaches two 2D physics bodies at a single point, allowing them to freely rotate. For example, a [RigidBody2D](class_rigidbody2d.md#class-rigidbody2d) can be attached to a [StaticBody2D](class_staticbody2d.md#class-staticbody2d) to create a pendulum or a seesaw.

| [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)    | [angular_limit_enabled](#class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-enabled)   | `false`   |
|-------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| [float](class_float.md#class-float) | [angular_limit_lower](#class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-lower)       | `0.0`     |
| [float](class_float.md#class-float) | [angular_limit_upper](#class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-upper)       | `0.0`     |
| [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)    | [motor_enabled](#class-pinjoint2d-property-motor-enabled)                   | `false`   |
| [float](class_float.md#class-float) | [motor_target_velocity](#class-pinjoint2d-property-motor-target-velocity)   | `0.0`     |
| [float](class_float.md#class-float) | [softness](#class-pinjoint2d-property-softness)                             | `0.0`     |

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **angular_limit_enabled** = `false` [🔗](#class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-enabled)

-  **set_angular_limit_enabled**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_angular_limit_enabled**()

If `true`, the pin maximum and minimum rotation, defined by [angular_limit_lower](#class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-lower) and [angular_limit_upper](#class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-upper) are applied.

---

<a id="class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-lower"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **angular_limit_lower** = `0.0` [🔗](#class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-lower)

-  **set_angular_limit_lower**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_angular_limit_lower**()

The minimum rotation. Only active if [angular_limit_enabled](#class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-enabled) is `true`.

---

<a id="class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-upper"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **angular_limit_upper** = `0.0` [🔗](#class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-upper)

-  **set_angular_limit_upper**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_angular_limit_upper**()

The maximum rotation. Only active if [angular_limit_enabled](#class-pinjoint2d-property-angular-limit-enabled) is `true`.

---

<a id="class-pinjoint2d-property-motor-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **motor_enabled** = `false` [🔗](#class-pinjoint2d-property-motor-enabled)

-  **set_motor_enabled**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_motor_enabled**()

When activated, a motor turns the pin.

---

<a id="class-pinjoint2d-property-motor-target-velocity"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **motor_target_velocity** = `0.0` [🔗](#class-pinjoint2d-property-motor-target-velocity)

-  **set_motor_target_velocity**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_motor_target_velocity**()

Target speed for the motor. In radians per second.

---

<a id="class-pinjoint2d-property-softness"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **softness** = `0.0` [🔗](#class-pinjoint2d-property-softness)

-  **set_softness**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_softness**()

The higher this value, the more the bond to the pinned partner can flex.
